response.justification: While Bogdan possesses exceptional technical skills that far exceed the job requirements—including expert-level TypeScript, React, Node.js, databases, AWS, and Kubernetes—he is dramatically overqualified as a Staff Engineer seeking a Junior/Mid-Level position. This creates significant risks: salary expectations misalignment, rapid boredom and early departure, and unrealistic role fit for the entry-level responsibilities outlined. His career trajectory suggests he would quickly outgrow the position within 12-18 months.
strengths: Expert-level proficiency across entire required stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, and Kubernetes—far exceeds baseline requirements
Deep commitment to clean architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship practices perfectly aligned with company values
Proven ability to architect and scale systems handling millions of requests; experience across mobile, desktop, web, and embedded systems
concerns: Severely overqualified as current Staff Engineer applying for Junior/Mid-Level role—creates high retention risk and likely departure within 12-18 months
Salary and title expectations fundamentally misaligned; compensation structure for entry-level position will not match candidate's market value
Geographic constraint unclear: resume shows Berlin but currently India-based; role requires high on-site presence in unspecified location
